prompt: Review PR #4528 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It fixes Orchestrion instrumentation for graphql-go and gqlgen integrations, adding support for context-like arguments in orchestrion.yml.

assertions.text: Flags that ArgumentThatImplements 'context.Context' path may receive nil arguments before the interface cast, causing a nil pointer dereference
Notes context variable shadowing or redeclaration — declaring a new ctx that shadows the parameter can cause unexpected behavior
Flags that the PR bundles an unrelated change to a different graphql integration (graphql-go/graphql vs 99designs/gqlgen) that should be in a separate PR
